endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Fleets belonging to your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets
endpoints.description: Create a new Fleet for scoping of deployed devices within your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Certificates
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Certificate credentials belonging to the Fleet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Certificates
endpoints.description: Enroll a new Certificate credential to the Fleet, optionally giving it a friendly name and assigning to a Device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Certificates/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch information about a specific Certificate credential in the Fleet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Certificates/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update the given properties of a specific Certificate credential in the Fleet, giving it a friendly name or assigning to a Device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Certificates/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Unregister a specific Certificate credential from the Fleet, effectively disallowing any inbound client connections that are presenting it.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Deployments
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Deployments belonging to the Fleet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Deployments
endpoints.description: Create a new Deployment in the Fleet, optionally giving it a friendly name and linking to a specific Twilio Sync service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Deployments/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch information about a specific Deployment in the Fleet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Deployments/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update the given properties of a specific Deployment credential in the Fleet, giving it a friendly name or linking to a specific Twilio Sync service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Deployments/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Deployment from the Fleet, leaving associated devices effectively undeployed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Devices
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Devices belonging to the Fleet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Devices
endpoints.description: Create a new Device in the Fleet, optionally giving it a unique name, friendly name, and assigning to a Deployment and/or human identity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Devices/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch information about a specific Device in the Fleet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Devices/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update the given properties of a specific Device in the Fleet, giving it a friendly name, assigning to a Deployment, or a human identity.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Devices/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Device from the Fleet, also removing it from associated Deployments.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Keys
endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all Keys credentials belonging to the Fleet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Keys
endpoints.description: Create a new Key credential in the Fleet, optionally giving it a friendly name and assigning to a Device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Keys/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch information about a specific Key credential in the Fleet.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Keys/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update the given properties of a specific Key credential in the Fleet, giving it a friendly name or assigning to a Device.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{FleetSid}/Keys/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Key credential from the Fleet, effectively disallowing any inbound client connections that are presenting it.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{FLEETSID}} with a real fleetsid. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Fetch information about a specific Fleet in your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: POST /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Update the friendly name property of a specific Fleet in your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: DELETE /DeployedDevices/Fleets/{Sid}
endpoints.description: Delete a specific Fleet from your account, also destroys all nested resources: Devices, Deployments, Certificates, Keys.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{TWILIO_USERNAME}} with your TWILIO USERNAME. Replace {{TWILIO_PASSWORD}} with your TWILIO PASSWORD. Replace {{SID}} with a real sid.

endpoints.name: GET /HostedNumbers/AuthorizationDocuments
